name: Intercultural Coach — Estonia
description: Awarded for completing the DiscoverEU Companion intercultural coaching micro-lesson for Estonia, demonstrating basic knowledge of greetings, food culture, social norms, money practices, and cultural context. Verified via hosted OpenBadge 2.0.

criteria.narrative: Complete the Estonia micro-lesson in DiscoverEU Companion and score at least 4 out of 5 on the quiz.

alignment.targetName: EU Key Competence 8: Cultural awareness and expression
